description_long: This is a low-profile, rectangular wooden cabinet with a rich walnut finish and a modern, minimalist design. The front face features two wide drawers with horizontal slats and recessed pull slots, giving it a sleek, contemporary look. The top surface is flat and smooth, suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the natural wood grain without any additional ornamentation. The cabinet sits close to the ground on a subtle base, emphasizing its horizontal proportions. There are no visible handles or glass panels, and the construction appears solid and robust, ideal for use as a media console or storage unit in urban environments.
description: A modern, low-profile walnut cabinet with two wide slatted drawers and a smooth, flat top. Its minimalist design features recessed pulls and a rich wood grain finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two wide drawers with horizontal slats and recessed pull slots.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, uninterrupted wood grain and the cabinet's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, featureless wooden back panel with no openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the plain wood grain and depth of the other side.
